title: LED Dog Leash for Night Walking - 1600FT USB-Rechargeable Reflective & Glow-in-the-Dark Leash with Padded Handle, Safety Light Up Lead for Small Medium Large Dogs(Green)
features: 【SUPER BRIGHT MUCH SAFER】500 meters of visibility makes your dog easy to see in traffic. Be seen by traffic, saving you or your pet's life.

【USB RECHARGEABLE】The dog glow collar fully charges via USB in just 2 hours, and with a battery indicator to remind you to charge it in time before the power is about to run out. Attention: When there is only 1-light up, it will keep flashing until it turns off automatically!

【3 LIGHTING MODES】USB charging technology, you can charge it anywhere, and it only takes 2 hours to fully charge.Our light up dog leash have 3 light modes for you to choose, fast flashing for 8 hours, slow flashing for 12 hours, and steady glow for 4 hours.

【COMFORTABLE, EASY TO HOLD AND SAFE 】360° rotating swivel clasp prevents the leash from twisting and dog getting tangled. Heavy-duty metal clasp makes our training leashes last longer than most ones, and the latest waterproof nylon material(NOT SWIMMING),very durable,strong and poof,easy to wash and stain resistant.
【HIGH VISBLE IN THE DARK】Change the light with just 1 click between: steady mode, slow flashing and rapid flashing in adverse weather conditions and any other low light situations.
